# Load the json files and inspect a bit to find fields and sample entries.
import json, os, textwrap, sys, re
qpath = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hpath = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'
print("Exists q:", os.path.exists(qpath), "h:", os.path.exists(hpath))
# Load small sample sizes
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)
print("Q entries:", len(qdata))
print("H entries:", len(hdata))

# show first q entries sample
for i in range(3):
    print(i, qdata[i].keys())
    print(qdata[i].get('ayah_text')[:200])
    print('---')
# show sample hadith entry keys
for i in range(3):
    print(i, list(hdata[i].keys()))
    # print small sample
    txt = hdata[i].get('hadithTxt') or hdata[i].get('Matn') or ''
    print(txt[:200])
    print('---')

# Let's extract the substring from Response_Context using given indices, then normalize and search qdata.
response_context = """ 
قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إن الشيطان يجري من ابن آدم مجرى الدم". 
وقال تعالى: "وَإِنْ كَادُوا لَيَفْتِنُونَكَ عَنِ الَّذِي أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ لِتَفْتَرِيَ عَلَيْنَا غَيْرَهُ وَإِذًا لاتَّخَذُوكَ خَلِيلاً" [الإسراء:73].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ" [الأنبياء:58].
وقال تعالى: "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ" [الأنبياء:58].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
"""

start = 1047
end = 1175
substring = response_context[start:end]
substring, len(response_context), start, end

# Build normalization function and search for matches.
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u06E1\u06E2\u06E3\u06E4\u06E7\u06E8\u06EA\u06EB\u06EC\u06EB\u06EC]""")
# But to be comprehensive, include most common diacritics:
diacritics = ''.join([chr(x) for x in list(range(0x0610,0x061A+1)) + list(range(0x064B,0x065F+1)) + [0x0670,0x0671,0x06D6,0x06D7,0x06D8,0x06D9,0x06DA,0x06DB,0x06DC,0x06DF,0x06E0,0x06E1,0x06E2,0x06E3,0x06E4,0x06E7,0x06E8,0x06EA,0x06EB,0x06EC,0x06ED]])
diacritics_re = re.compile("[" + re.escape(''.join(diacritics)) + "]")
tatweel_re = re.compile("\u0640")
punctuation_re = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A]")  # maybe removes punctuation but retains Arabic letters and digits and underscores
# However \w includes underscores and digits and letters Latin; better create own pattern to remove punctuation and parentheses and punctuation.
# Let's implement a function carefully.
def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s or ''
    # strip Arabic diacritics and tatweel
    # Remove diacritics manually (common diacritics range)
    s = re.sub("[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u0671\u06E9]","", s)
    s = s.replace('\u0640','')  # tatweel
    # Normalize hamza variants and other letters:
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # Remove punctuation characters (common Arabic punctuation and Latin punctuation)
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0621-\u064Aa-zA-Z0-9\s]", " ", s)
    # collapse whitespace and lowercase (no case in Arabic)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    s = s.lower()
    return s

# Test normalize
query = substring
print("orig:", query)
print("norm:", normalize_arabic(query))

# search for 'خلقنا' occurrences quickly by normalized substring search
norm_query = normalize_arabic(query)
# compute normalized texts for qdata and find candidates containing substring
matches = []
for entry in qdata:
    ayah = entry['ayah_text']
    norm_ayah = normalize_arabic(ayah)
    if 'wlaqad' in norm_ayah: # quick debug
        pass
# Instead search for 'خلقنا الانسان' mapping to arabic 'خلقنا الانسان'
kw = 'خلقنا الانسان'  # normalized words
candidates = []
for entry in qdata:
    ayah = entry['ayah_text']
    n = normalize_arabic(ayah)
    if kw in n:
        candidates.append(entry)
len(candidates)

for e in candidates:
    print(e['surah_name'], e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'])
    print(e['ayah_text'])
    print("norm:", normalize_arabic(e['ayah_text']))
    print("----")

# define LCS function
def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming for longest common subsequence
    n = len(a); m = len(b)
    # Use 2 rows optimization to save memory
    dp_prev = [0]*(m+1)
    dp_cur = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        ai = a[i-1]
        dp_cur[0] = 0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp_cur[j] = dp_prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                dp_cur[j] = dp_prev[j] if dp_prev[j] >= dp_cur[j-1] else dp_cur[j-1]
        dp_prev, dp_cur = dp_cur, dp_prev
    return dp_prev[m]

def token_f1(a, b):
    # tokens split by spaces
    atoks = a.split()
    btoks = b.split()
    if len(atoks)==0 and len(btoks)==0:
        return 1.0
    atoks_count = {}
    for t in atoks:
        atoks_count[t] = atoks_count.get(t,0) + 1
    overlap = 0
    for t in btoks:
        if atoks_count.get(t,0) > 0:
            overlap += 1
            atoks_count[t] -= 1
    p = overlap / len(btoks) if len(btoks)>0 else 0.0
    r = overlap / len(atoks) if len(atoks)>0 else 0.0
    if p + r == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*p*r/(p+r)

query_norm = normalize_arabic(substring)
candidate = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_id']==50 and e['ayah_id']==16][0]
candidate_text = candidate['ayah_text']
cand_norm = normalize_arabic(candidate_text)
print("Candidate text:", candidate_text)
print("Normalized candidate:", cand_norm)
print("Normalized query:", query_norm)
lcs_len = lcs_length(query_norm, cand_norm)
lcs_ratio = (2*lcs_len) / (len(query_norm) + len(cand_norm))
tok_f1 = token_f1(query_norm, cand_norm)
char_cosine = lcs_len / max(len(query_norm), len(cand_norm))
lcs_len, lcs_ratio, tok_f1, char_cosine, len(query_norm), len(cand_norm)

# search for 'لا تبصرون' in qdata
kw = 'لا تبصرون'
matches=[]
for e in qdata:
    if kw in normalize_arabic(e['ayah_text']):
        matches.append(e)
len(matches), matches[:5]

for e in matches:
    print(e['surah_name'], e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'])
    print(e['ayah_text'])
    print('norm:', normalize_arabic(e['ayah_text']))
    print('----')

# Compose candidate combining Qaf 50:16 and Waqi'ah 56:85 texts
c50 = candidate_text  # surah 50:16
# find surah 56:85 entry
c56 = None
for e in qdata:
    if e['surah_id'] == 56 and e['ayah_id'] == 85:
        c56 = e['ayah_text']
        break
c56, c50

combined = c50 + " " + c56
combined_norm = normalize_arabic(combined)
query_norm = normalize_arabic(substring)
lcs_len_comb = lcs_length(query_norm, combined_norm)
lcs_ratio_comb = (2*lcs_len_comb) / (len(query_norm) + len(combined_norm))
tok_f1_comb = token_f1(query_norm, combined_norm)
len(query_norm), len(combined_norm), lcs_len_comb, lcs_ratio_comb, tok_f1_comb, combined_norm, query_norm[:200]

# candidate Waqi'ah 56:85
cand56 = c56
cand56_norm = normalize_arabic(cand56)
lcs_len_56 = lcs_length(query_norm, cand56_norm)
lcs_ratio_56 = (2*lcs_len_56) / (len(query_norm) + len(cand56_norm))
tok_f1_56 = token_f1(query_norm, cand56_norm)
len(query_norm), len(cand56_norm), lcs_len_56, lcs_ratio_56, tok_f1_56, cand56_norm, query_norm

# Get exact string programmatically
entry_50_16 = None
for e in qdata:
    if e['surah_id'] == 50 and e['ayah_id'] == 16:
        entry_50_16 = e
        break
entry_50_16
